insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a streak and improving your scores. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can break down your goals into manageable tasks and set yourself up for success, so take that first step today and start laying the groundwork for achieving your full potential.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
